examples: It is not, as some have argued, a jeremiad; it is Bloom's Apology.
Two critics who call the book a "Jeremiad" ultimately gave it a positive review.
Siegel's book is a jeremiad against the ills the Internet has visited upon our lives.
Paul Krugman, in a blog entitled Cranky Old Men, attacked a Sunday New York Times jeremiad by former OMB Director David Stockman.
